user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add new announcement images, so that automated event announcements display the correct visuals
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Announcement Images screen; When I click Add new announcement images and provide the details; Then a new image entry is saved and shown in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view announcement images by event type and years, so that I can confirm which image maps to each milestone
acceptance_criteria: Given announcement images exist; When I view the list; Then I see Event type, Years and Task columns for each entry

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing announcement image entry, so that I can correct the event type or year mapping
acceptance_criteria: Given an announcement image row is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated mapping is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh and page through the announcement images list, so that I can review all configured images
acceptance_criteria: Given more images exist than fit one page; When I click Refresh or use pagination; Then the current set of image entries is reloaded and displayed
